title: session record — frontmatter of records/sessions/<lane>/<YYYY-MM-DD>-<HHMMSS>-<agent>.md
description: The forensic tier's sole content (C06): why, dead ends, unfinished intent. Written by `baseline log` (scrubbed at write time) and validated against this schema before the file exists. The body carries '## Did', '## Dead ends', and '## Left open' with a 'next:' line — the exact shape orient already reads as the lane's pause state. Filenames are collision-free by construction (CF1: date-time-agent, no counter). Records are append-only once committed (REC-01 proof lands M4c). Deliberately minimal: context belongs in the body prose, not in new fields.

record.description: Record kind + schema version. Lets the engine refuse or migrate a record written for a different contract.

lane.description: Lane id = branch name (FS2: lane identity is the branch, not an assignment). Must match the directory the record lives under; no whitespace/backslash, and the writer refuses any lane that resolves outside records/sessions/.

agent.description: Slugged author (agent or human) — also the filename suffix, which is what keeps same-second writes by different agents collision-free.

started.description: UTC start instant; the filename's <YYYY-MM-DD>-<HHMMSS> is derived from it.
